title: Importing Large SQL Files on GoDaddy Hosting
description: GoDaddy phpMyAdmin limits are low. Here’s how to get big imports done.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: GoDaddy’s phpMyAdmin upload caps make large imports painful.
Split the dump into smaller files and import sequentially.

content.title: Import on GoDaddy
content.text: Split your dump and bypass upload caps.

faq.question: Does GoDaddy allow SSH?
faq.answer: Some plans do, many shared plans do not.
